sourcesContent: import React from 'react'; import { Box, Typography, Avatar, Grid, Chip, Paper, Button, Stack } from '@mui/material'; import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom'; const skills = [ 'Full Stack Development', 'React', 'Node.js', 'MongoDB', 'Machine Learning', 'Python', 'Express', 'MUI', 'REST APIs', 'Problem Solving', ]; const About = () => { return ( Abdulhadi Abbas Akanni Full Stack Developer & Machine Learning Enthusiast About Me I am a passionate developer with a strong background in Computer Science and Engineering, currently studying at GITAM University. My expertise spans full stack web development, machine learning, and building intelligent, scalable systems. I thrive on solving complex problems and delivering elegant, user-focused solutions. Values: Integrity, continuous learning, collaboration, and a drive for excellence. I believe in using technology to make a positive impact and enjoy mentoring others in their tech journey. {skills.map((skill) => ( ))} ); }; export default About;
